market_context:
Cohort size: 4 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £90.20
Median 90-day occupancy: 55.4%
Median photo count: 23

title_variants: Spacious 3BR Home Steps from Train, Garden & WiFi
analysis.rewritten_desc: Enjoy a centrally‑located stay in Middleton at this fully‑furnished 3‑bedroom house, perfect for families, friends or contractors. The property is just under a mile (about a 10‑minute train ride) from Manchester Centre, giving you easy access to the city while you relax in a quiet neighbourhood. All three bedrooms feature fresh linens, towels, and their own 52‑inch TV with Netflix, so everyone can unwind after a day of exploring. The spacious living area also boasts a large TV with Netflix, a comfortable sofa, and free Wi‑Fi. A modern kitchen at the rear is equipped with a new fridge‑freezer, cooker, hob, toaster, coffee maker and a washer; a tumble dryer can be added on request. You’ll appreciate the private driveway that provides one guaranteed parking space, plus a rear garden for outdoor relaxation. Self‑check‑in is simple with a key box and smart lock. Central heating and hot water are included in the price. For peace of mind, a door‑bell camera is installed at the front door. Guests have full access to the bedrooms, kitchen, living room, bathroom, garden and parking. Whether you’re visiting for work or leisure, this home offers comfort, convenience and entertainment in one package.
top_amenity_gaps: Exterior security cameras on the property
Tumble dryer for added laundry convenience
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a bright front‑exterior shot showing the driveway and garden as the cover photo – it instantly highlights the private parking and outdoor space, the two strongest selling points.
key_diagnosis: Raise the nightly rate from £89 to around £95; you’re already 64.1% booked (32 open nights) and the market median rate is £90.20, so a modest increase can boost revenue without hurting occupancy.
Rewrite the title to include high‑search keywords ("3‑Bedroom", "parking", "central", "Netflix"); the current title is only 25 characters and scores 3/10, limiting SEO visibility.

Reorder the photo gallery so the first image is the front‑exterior with driveway; with 25 photos (above the cohort median of 23) you have ample coverage, but the lead image currently doesn’t showcase the parking advantage.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your listing already books 64% of nights at £89—let's boost visibility with a keyword‑rich title and a cover photo that showcases the private parking to push bookings even higher.
